Indices

  • General Index
  • Documentation

Documentation#

SpaceNet is a Python package for spatial network analysis. It is structured into several subpackages, each of which contains functions and classes for specific types of spatial network analysis. The subpackages are listed below, along with a brief description of each one.

Subpackage

Description

utils

A useful collection of utility functions for spatial network analysis.

pcf

Pair correlation functions for spatial networks.

partition

Methods for partitioning spatial networks.

datasets

Datasets for testing and demonstration of spatial network analysis methods.

SpaceNet reference list#

All of the modules are listed below, and each module has its own documentation page that provides a detailed description of the functions and classes that are available in that module.

  • spacenet.utils
    • Utility functions
      • spacenet.utils.generate_spatial_network
        • generate_spatial_network()
      • spacenet.utils.plot_spatial_network
        • plot_spatial_network()
  • spacenet.pcf
    • Pair correlation functions
      • spacenet.pcf.cross_pair_correlation_function
        • cross_pair_correlation_function()
      • spacenet.pcf.weighted_pair_correlation_function
        • weighted_pair_correlation_function()
      • spacenet.pcf.cross_weighted_pair_correlation_function
        • cross_weighted_pair_correlation_function()
    • Correlation helper functions
      • spacenet.pcf.helpers.spatial_bootstrap
        • spatial_bootstrap()
      • spacenet.pcf.helpers.polynomial_kernel
        • polynomial_kernel()
      • spacenet.pcf.helpers.integrated_poly_finite_kernel
        • integrated_poly_finite_kernel()
      • spacenet.pcf.helpers.is_connected_filter
        • is_connected_filter()
      • spacenet.pcf.helpers.compute_contributions
        • compute_contributions()
      • spacenet.pcf.helpers.compute_weighted_contributions
        • compute_weighted_contributions()
      • spacenet.pcf.helpers.compute_contributions_parallel
        • compute_contributions_parallel()
      • spacenet.pcf.helpers.compute_weighted_contributions_parallel
        • compute_weighted_contributions_parallel()
      • spacenet.pcf.helpers.batched_dijkstra
        • batched_dijkstra()
  • spacenet.partition
    • Spatial network partitioning
      • spacenet.partition.compact_volume_partition
        • compact_volume_partition()
  • spacenet.datasets
    • spacenet.datasets.load_dataset
      • load_dataset()
